data.name: Hentai Clicker: Bethy is streaming
data.detailed_description:
🎮 Welcome to Hentai Clicker: Bethy is streaming

The lights dim, the music starts, and Bethy, your irresistible bunny girl, takes the stage.
With every click, she moves, teases, and strips down just for you — her favorite viewer.
She’s playful, seductive, and knows exactly how to make your heart (and hands) race.

🐰 About the Game

Hentai Clicker: Bethy is streaming blends addictive clicker gameplay with the sinful thrill of a strip club fantasy.
Tap to collect hearts as Bethy dances, flirts, and shows off her stunning curves.
Each click brings you closer to unlocking sexy outfits, erotic animations, and hot reactions that turn her private show into pure temptation.

🔞 NSFW Scenes

From slow, sensual teasing to full-on, bunny-girl strip action, Bethy knows how to keep your eyes — and your attention — on her.
Enjoy explicit animations, juicy transitions, and intimate close-ups that capture every sultry move.

🎉 Features

🐇 Seductive Bunny Girl – A gorgeous dancer who loves being watched.
🖱️ Clicker Gameplay – Simple, sexy, and dangerously addicting.
💗 Unlockable Outfits – From cute bunny lingerie to fully nude reveals.
🔊 Lewd Voice Acting – Gasps, moans, and teasing lines as she strips for you.
💃 Stage Progression – Earn hearts to unlock new dances, scenes, and performances.

💖 Why You’ll Love It

Bethy is more than a dancer — she’s a fantasy brought to life.
She flirts, bends, and teases her way into your mind until you can’t look away.
Each move is a promise, each smile a challenge — and you’ll never want the show to end.

🎮 How to Play

🖱️ Click to Earn Hearts – Each tap heats up the stage and makes Bethy move.
🔓 Unlock Strip Shows – Spend hearts to undress her, reveal new poses, and watch her perform.
💥 Upgrade Skills – Boost your clicks, increase her arousal, and unlock new dances.

🎉 Let the Show Begin!

Ready to take the front row seat? 😈
Jump into Hentai Clicker: Bethy is streaming and let this naughty bunny show you how wild a private show can get.

data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 韓文, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.11
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
